overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player character ascends multiple staircases through commercial and industrial walkways, passing holographic advertisements, NPCs, and navigating from open elevated platforms into enclosed corridors and back to exterior walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway toward stairs following a pedestrian in a white jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead up the stairs

entered.detail: large pink neon poster with face and text 'The Heart of a Dream'
wide concrete staircase leading upward to upper level
red metal safety railing along the walkway edge
futuristic city buildings with illuminated windows and neon signs in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated walkway in a cyberpunk city at night, with neon signs illuminating the scene. The player follows an NPC toward a wide concrete staircase, passing a large pink holographic poster on the right. The cityscape stretches into the distance with multiple levels of buildings and advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial entrance with large overhead billboard

events.description: reaches top of main stairs and approaches metal gate entrance
passes through metal gate into enclosed commercial area

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and entering a commercial area with a large loan advertisement overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking through the gate ahead

entered.detail: massive green and yellow illuminated billboard advertising 'SPEED LOANS' with '31.1% APR' text
security gate with mesh fencing marking entrance to commercial building
green neon sign reading 'PAWN SHOP' visible through the gate

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the final steps of the main staircase, passing under a massive 'Speed Loans' billboard. The environment transitions from open walkway to a more enclosed commercial entrance with a metal security gate. A pawn shop sign glows green in the background as the player approaches the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor corridor with pawn shop and graffiti

events.description: turns corner into narrow corridor with graffiti walls and scattered trash

agents.ego_description: walking through ground level corridor passing the pawn shop entrance and debris

notable_agents.action: individual standing against graffiti-covered wall near the corner

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
scattered newspapers, cans, and debris littering the concrete floor
large circular ventilation fan mounted on the wall
narrow concrete staircase leading upward to next level

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the player navigates a gritty ground-floor corridor littered with trash. The pawn shop sign remains visible ahead while graffiti covers the walls. The player approaches a secondary stairwell on the left, passing an NPC standing against the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service stairwell with industrial piping

agents.ego_description: climbing narrow concrete service stairs with industrial ventilation and piping

entered.detail: metal ventilation grilles and air conditioning units mounted on the wall
exposed metal piping and conduits running along the stairwell wall
metal service door at the top of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a narrow, industrial service stairwell devoid of other people. Exposed pipes and ventilation equipment line the walls. The environment is purely functional with concrete surfaces and artificial lighting, leading upward toward a metal door at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper industrial walkway with neon advertisements

events.description: exits stairwell onto elevated industrial walkway with city views
passes two NPCs leaning on railing overlooking the city below

agents.ego_description: walking along upper industrial walkway passing NPCs and neon signs overlooking the city

notable_agents.action: two individuals leaning on railing looking down at the city view below

entered.detail: narrow concrete walkway with red safety railing overlooking the city
expansive view of multi-level futuristic city with neon lights and building facades
purple and red neon sign for a bar or club
large poster with red text 'SAMURAI' and image of a musician with guitar
red metal safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell, the player enters an upper industrial walkway with expansive views of the neon-lit city. The path is lined with advertisements including a prominent 'Samurai' poster. Two NPCs lean against the railing enjoying the view as the player continues along the elevated path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, open-air neon plaza through a gritty industrial interior and back out to an elevated city vista. It begins on an elevated walkway where the camera follows an NPC past a large pink holographic poster toward a wide concrete staircase. As the camera ascends the steps under a massive Speed Loans billboard, the environment shifts from the open cityscape into a confined commercial entrance marked by a glowing green pawn shop sign. The scene then moves through a trash-strewn corridor covered in graffiti before turning into a narrow, functional service stairwell lined with exposed pipes and artificial lighting. Finally, the camera emerges from the industrial climb onto an upper walkway, where the view expands once more to reveal the neon skyline and a prominent Samurai poster.
